title: Compliance
doc_html:
§1203.5. Compliance

            The department shall review the employment files of any facility or agency required to obtain criminal history records to ensure such facilities are in compliance with the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 1993, No. 594, §1, eff. August 15, 1994; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.55 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1203.5.  Compliance
The department shall review the employment files of any facility or agency required
to obtain criminal history records to ensure such facilities are in compliance with the
provisions of this Part.
Acts 1993, No. 594, §1, eff. August 15, 1994; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.55
by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
